PreToolUse.command: bash -c 'FILE="${TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-${TOOL_INPUT_file_path:-}}"; if [[ "$FILE" == *.env* ]] || [[ "$FILE" == *appsettings.Development* ]] || [[ "$FILE" == *credentials* ]] || [[ "$FILE" == *secret* ]]; then echo "BLOCKED: Do not edit secrets files — use dotnet user-secrets instead" >&2; exit 1; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'FILE="${TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-${TOOL_INPUT_file_path:-}}"; if [[ "$FILE" == *content.ts ]] && [[ "$FILE" == *Extension* ]]; then echo "WARNING: content.ts captureDOM() is NEVER CALLED. The actual capture function is capturePageDOM() in background.ts. Are you sure you want to edit this file?" >&2; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'FILE="${TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-${TOOL_INPUT_file_path:-}}"; if [[ "$FILE" == *package-lock.json ]] || [[ "$FILE" == *yarn.lock ]]; then echo "BLOCKED: Do not edit lock files directly" >&2; exit 1; fi; exit 0'
